London’s cutest afternoon tea at The Langham ✨🫖

Experience the magic of spectacular Christmas trees and festive decorations at The Langham 🎄🌟

The Hamleys Festive Afternoon Tea at Palm Court featuring:
🧸 Children’s afternoon tea inspired by classic toys, complete with a Hamleys Bear  🍰 Adult afternoon tea reimagining nostalgic childhood favourites with a playful twist 

📍 The Langham, 1C Portland Pl,  W1B 1JA @langham_london @hamleysofficial
